text: BREAKING: Iran sends 10-point counter-proposal to US via mediator Pakistan. Rejects nuclear moratorium demand. Demands: end war on all fronts incl. Lebanon, Hormuz shipping safety, sanctions lifted, assets unfrozen, compensation. Trump immediately calls it 'playing games.' Netanyahu called Trump urging against ceasefire.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera and NBC News confirmed Iran's response. Times of Israel confirmed Netanyahu-Trump call.

text: ASSESSMENT: Drone attacks on Qatar, UAE, Kuwait mark significant escalation — Iran expanding target set to Gulf mediators. Qatar cargo ship hit near Mesaieed, UAE intercepted 2 drones, Kuwait repelled airspace incursion. S. Korea confirms drone attack on HMM NAMU in Hormuz. Iran targeting even countries mediating on its behalf.
verificationNote: Fortune, Al Jazeera, and Japan Times confirmed Gulf drone attacks. Qatar Defense Ministry official statement.

text: INTEL: WSJ reveals Israel built secret military outpost in western Iraq desert for Iran air campaign — housing special forces and IAF logistical hub. When Iraqi shepherd spotted helicopter activity and troops investigated, Israel launched airstrikes killing 1 Iraqi soldier, wounding 2. Iraq filed UN complaint attributing attack to US.
verificationNote: Wall Street Journal investigative report confirmed by Haaretz and US News.

text: LEBANON CRISIS: Israel kills 39 across Lebanon on May 10 — deadliest day since ceasefire. Strikes hit Saadiyat highway near Beirut, Beirut-Sidon highway, Chouf road. IDF struck 85+ targets on May 9 incl. underground Beqaa Valley weapons factory. 9 villages issued evacuation warnings near Tyre. Ceasefire exists in name only.
verificationNote: Euronews and Al Jazeera confirmed 39 killed on May 10. JNS confirmed 85+ targets on May 9.

text: HEALTH STATUS: US Ambassador Waltz says on ABC's This Week that Mojtaba Khamenei 'has been severely injured, he's in hiding, and incredibly difficult to get a hold of.' Same day, Iran state media published photos of Khamenei meeting Maj. Gen. Abdollahi and issuing new military directives. Conflicting claims — unverifiable.
verificationNote: The National confirmed Waltz quotes. Press TV published meeting photos. Khamenei has never appeared publicly since becoming Supreme Leader.

text: HORMUZ UPDATE: First Qatari LNG tanker Al Kharaitiyat transits Hormuz since war began — bound for Pakistan's Port Qasim. Iran approved as confidence-building measure. Panama-flagged bulk carrier also transited using Iran-designated route. CENTCOM: 61 vessels redirected, 1,550+ stranded, 22,500 mariners trapped. Blockade Day 69.
verificationNote: CNBC and Bloomberg confirmed Qatari LNG transit. CENTCOM blockade statistics confirmed.

text: OIL/ENERGY: Brent $101.29 (+26.9%), WTI $95.42 (+26.4%). ~6% weekly loss after Axios MOU exclusive triggered massive selloff. Suspicious $920M crude short placed 70 min before report dropped, netting ~$125M. Kharg Island: 80,000-barrel oil spill covering 71 sq km. Gas $4.52/gal (AAA). FAO Food Price Index hits 3-yr high 130.7.
verificationNote: Trading Economics confirmed oil prices. Seeking Alpha confirmed suspicious short. Al Jazeera confirmed Kharg Island spill via satellite imagery. AAA confirmed gas price.

text: DANGER: IRGC Aerospace Force commander Mousavi declares Iranian missiles and drones 'already locked onto enemy targets in the region, awaiting the order to fire.' Iran parliament security commissioner: 'Our restraint is over as of today.' Most explicit targeting declaration since ceasefire April 8.
verificationNote: Tribune India and Al Jazeera confirmed IRGC commander statement. Times of Israel confirmed parliament commissioner quote.

text: NETANYAHU CBS: Israeli PM says war 'not over' because Iran still holds ~440kg 60%-enriched uranium. Quote: 'You go in, and you take it out.' Sets maximum Israeli demand for any peace deal — physical removal of uranium, not just monitoring. Potential US-Israel tension on this demand.
verificationNote: CBS News and Bloomberg confirmed Netanyahu 60 Minutes interview quotes.

text: DIPLOMATIC COLLAPSE: Trump posted on Truth Social 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' rejecting Iran's counter-proposal. Iran offered to transfer some HEU to a third country but refused to dismantle enrichment facilities. Core sticking point: Iran's 440kg 60%-enriched uranium stockpile and continued enrichment rights.
verificationNote: Axios, CNN, and Al Jazeera confirmed Trump Truth Social post and Iran's counter-proposal content.

text: IRAN LEADERSHIP: Pezeshkian declared 'We will never bow our heads before the enemy.' Araghchi simultaneously in Beijing meeting China FM Wang Yi for back-channel diplomacy. Mojtaba Khamenei health reports conflicted — Waltz says 'severely injured, in hiding' while Iran state media published photos of him meeting generals same day.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera confirmed Pezeshkian statement. CNN confirmed Araghchi-Wang Yi meeting. The National confirmed conflicting Khamenei health reports.

text: SANCTIONS ROUND: US Treasury and State Dept sanctioned 10 entities in Middle East, China, Hong Kong for supplying UAV components and weapons to Iran. State Dept separately targeting Iran-China illicit oil trade networks. Part of 'Economic Fury' campaign coordinated with military operations.
verificationNote: CNBC confirmed 10-entity sanctions. US Treasury press release sb0496. State Dept spokesperson releases confirmed Iran-China oil network sanctions.

text: GULF CRACKDOWN: Bahrain arrests 41 for IRGC espionage, stripped 69 of citizenship. UAE intercepted 2 Iranian drones May 10. Kuwait repelled hostile drone airspace incursion. Gulf states in coordinated crackdown on Iranian influence networks — largest such arrests since war began.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera and Gulf News confirmed Bahrain arrests. Times of Israel confirmed UAE and Kuwait drone incidents.
